rule_metadata.name: Embedded_EXE_Cloaking
rule_metadata.description: Detects an embedded executable in a non-executable file
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rule_metadata.name: Cloaked_as_JPG
rule_metadata.description: Detects a cloaked file as JPG
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (eval section from Didier Stevens)

rules.rule_text:
rule Cloaked_as_JPG
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a cloaked file as JPG"
		author = "Florian Roth (eval section from Didier Stevens)"
		date = "2015/02/29"
		score = 40

	condition:
		uint16be( 0x00 ) != 0xFFD8 and extension matches /\.jpg/i and filetype != "GIF"
}

rule_metadata.name: GIFCloaked_Webshell
rule_metadata.description: Detects a webshell that cloakes itself with GIF header(s) - Based on Dark Security Team Webshell
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule GIFCloaked_Webshell
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects a webshell that cloakes itself with GIF header(s) - Based on Dark Security Team Webshell"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		hash = "f1c95b13a71ca3629a0bb79601fcacf57cdfcf768806a71b26f2448f8c1d5d24"
		score = 60

	strings:
		$magic = "GIF"
		$s0 = "input type"
		$s1 = "<%eval request"
		$s2 = "<%eval(Request.Item["
		$s3 = "LANGUAGE='VBScript'"

	condition:
		($magic at 0 ) and ( 1 of ( $s* ) )
}

rule_metadata.name: Suspicious_Size_explorer_exe
rule_metadata.description: Detects uncommon file size of explorer.exe
rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth

rules.rule_text:
rule Suspicious_Size_explorer_exe
{
	meta:
		description = "Detects uncommon file size of explorer.exe"
		author = "Florian Roth"
		score = 60
		date = "2015-12-21"

	condition:
		uint16( 0 ) == 0x5a4d and filename == "explorer.exe" and not filepath contains "teamviewer" and ( filesize < 1000KB or filesize > 3500KB )
}
